## Description

A clear description of what is broken. What did you expect to happen, and what happened instead?

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Configure Chappie with `...`
2. Run `...`
3. Observe `...`

Include a minimal code snippet if possible.

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output.

```
paste output here
```

## Environment

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.4 |
| LiteLLM version | e.g. 1.42.0 |
| Chappie version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| Store | Redis / MemoryStore |
| Mode | observe / enforce |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help: logs, config snippets, how frequently this happens.
